# Spectral Decomposition

**Summary**: A seismic processing technique used to highlight different frequency components of the signal.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] used spectral-decomposition to identify channel geometries and orientations on specific stratigraphic surfaces.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified a meandering channel belt in the NE-SW direction on SB-1 using 10Hz and 40Hz decomposition. ([[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015, p. 89]])
